list.name: OOM Kill
list.rawQuery:
SELECT
  timestamp AS time,
  concat(
    'OOM Kill: ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    '\nRSS max: ', formatReadableSize(rss_max_bytes),
    '\nCgroup: ', cgroup,
    '\nCmd: ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), '')
  ) AS text,
  'OOM Kill' AS tags
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'oom_kill'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp

target.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS time,
  concat(
    'OOM Kill: ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    '\nRSS max: ', formatReadableSize(rss_max_bytes),
    '\nCgroup: ', cgroup,
    '\nCmd: ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), '')
  ) AS text,
  'OOM Kill' AS tags
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'oom_kill'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp

list.name: Non-Zero Exit
list.rawQuery:
SELECT
  timestamp AS time,
  concat(
    'EXIT rc=', toString(exit_code),
    ' | ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    ' | ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), ''),
    if(cgroup != '', concat(' | cgroup: ', cgroup), '')
  ) AS text,
  'exit_error' AS tags
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'exit'
  AND exit_code != 0
  AND NOT (comm IN ('grep', 'kafka-run-class', 'ls', 'runc', 'runc:[2:INIT]', 'bash', 'iptables') AND exit_code IN (1, 2))
    AND NOT (comm = 'sshd' AND exit_code = 255)
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp

target.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS time,
  concat(
    'EXIT rc=', toString(exit_code),
    ' | ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    ' | ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), ''),
    if(cgroup != '', concat(' | cgroup: ', cgroup), '')
  ) AS text,
  'exit_error' AS tags
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'exit'
  AND exit_code != 0
  AND NOT (comm IN ('grep', 'kafka-run-class', 'ls', 'runc', 'runc:[2:INIT]', 'bash', 'iptables') AND exit_code IN (1, 2))
    AND NOT (comm = 'sshd' AND exit_code = 255)
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp

description: eBPF-based process monitoring: CPU, memory, cgroups, I/O, network, files

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT pid) AS processes FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 2 MINUTE AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})

SELECT sum(rss_bytes) AS total_rss FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 2 MINUTE AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring}) AND timestamp >= (SELECT max(timestamp) - INTERVAL 1 SECOND FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}))

SELECT sum(cpu_usage_ratio) AS total_cpu FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 2 MINUTE AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring}) AND timestamp >= (SELECT max(timestamp) - INTERVAL 1 SECOND FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}))

SELECT count(DISTINCT cgroup) AS cgroups FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 2 MINUTE AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) AND cgroup_memory_current > 0

SELECT count() AS events FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type IN ('fork','exec','exit','oom_kill') AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3) AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})

SELECT count() AS oom_kills FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='oom_kill' AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3) AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})

WITH top5 AS (
  SELECT comm
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND cpu_usage_ratio BETWEEN 0 AND 128
  GROUP BY comm
  ORDER BY avg(cpu_usage_ratio) DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 3 SECOND) AS time,
  if(comm IN (SELECT comm FROM top5), comm, 'other') AS process,
  sum(cpu_usage_ratio) / countDistinct(timestamp) AS cpu_cores
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND cpu_usage_ratio BETWEEN 0 AND 128
GROUP BY time, process
ORDER BY time

WITH top5 AS (
  SELECT comm
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY comm
  ORDER BY avg(rss_bytes) DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 3 SECOND) AS time,
  if(comm IN (SELECT comm FROM top5), comm, 'other') AS process,
  sum(rss_bytes) / countDistinct(timestamp) AS rss
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
GROUP BY time, process
ORDER BY time

SELECT *,
  (cpu_cores / nullIf(max(cpu_cores) OVER (), 0)
 + rss / nullIf(max(rss) OVER (), 0)
 + io_total / nullIf(max(io_total) OVER (), 0)
 + net_total / nullIf(max(net_total) OVER (), 0)) AS rating
FROM (
  SELECT
    comm,
    any(exec) AS exec_path,
    any(args) AS cmdline,
    any(uid) AS uid,
    length(groupUniqArray(pid)) AS pids,
    sum(cpu_usage_ratio) AS cpu_cores,
    sum(rss_bytes) AS rss,
    sum(io_read_bytes) + sum(io_write_bytes) AS io_total,
    sum(net_tx_bytes) + sum(net_rx_bytes) AS net_total
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND timestamp >= (SELECT max(timestamp) - INTERVAL 1 SECOND FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}))
  GROUP BY comm
)
ORDER BY rating DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
  cgroup,
  max(cgroup_memory_current) AS mem_current
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND cgroup_memory_current > 0
GROUP BY time, cgroup
HAVING max(cgroup_memory_current) > 10485760
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
  cgroup,
  max(cgroup_memory_current) / max(cgroup_memory_max) AS usage_pct
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND cgroup_memory_max > 0
  AND cgroup_memory_current > 0
GROUP BY time, cgroup
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  cgroup,
  any(rule) AS rule,
  max(cgroup_memory_current) AS mem_current,
  max(cgroup_memory_max) AS mem_max,
  if(max(cgroup_memory_max) > 0, max(cgroup_memory_current) / max(cgroup_memory_max), 0) AS usage_pct,
  max(cgroup_swap_current) AS swap,
  max(cgroup_cpu_weight) AS cpu_weight,
  max(cgroup_pids_current) AS pids
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 2 MINUTE
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND cgroup_memory_current > 0
GROUP BY cgroup
ORDER BY usage_pct DESC

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process,
  max(cpu_usage_ratio) AS cpu
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND cpu_usage_ratio > 0.001
  AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR args ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
GROUP BY time, process
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process,
  max(rss_bytes) AS rss
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND rss_bytes > 1048576
  AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR args ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
GROUP BY time, process
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process,
  max(io_read_bytes) AS io_read
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND io_read_bytes > 0
  AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR args ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
GROUP BY time, process
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process,
  max(io_write_bytes) AS io_write
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND io_write_bytes > 0
  AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR args ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
GROUP BY time, process
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  pid,
  any(comm) AS process_name,
  any(exec) AS exec_path,
  any(rule) AS match_rule,
  any(cgroup) AS cgroup_path,
  max(cpu_usage_ratio) AS cpu,
  max(rss_bytes) AS rss,
  max(vsize_bytes) AS vsize,
  max(io_read_bytes) AS io_r,
  max(io_write_bytes) AS io_w,
  max(threads) AS threads,
  max(uptime_seconds) AS uptime_s
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 2 MINUTE
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR args ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
GROUP BY pid
ORDER BY rss DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  event_type,
  count() AS cnt
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type IN ('fork','exec','exit','oom_kill')
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
GROUP BY time, event_type
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  timestamp,
  event_type,
  pid,
  comm,
  exec,
  rule,
  exit_code
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type IN ('exec','exit','oom_kill')
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process,
  count() AS connections
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
GROUP BY time, process
HAVING connections > 1
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), '] TX') AS series,
  sum(net_conn_tx_bytes) / 60 AS bps
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND net_conn_tx_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), '] RX') AS series,
  sum(net_conn_rx_bytes) / 60 AS bps
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND net_conn_rx_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

SELECT *,
  (connections / nullIf(max(connections) OVER (), 0)
 + io_total / nullIf(max(io_total) OVER (), 0)
 + avg_duration_ms / nullIf(max(avg_duration_ms) OVER (), 0)) AS rating
FROM (
  SELECT
    comm,
    concat(net_local_addr, ':', toString(net_local_port)) AS local,
    concat(net_remote_addr, ':', toString(net_remote_port)) AS remote,
    count() AS connections,
    sum(net_conn_tx_bytes) + sum(net_conn_rx_bytes) AS io_total,
    if(sum(net_conn_tx_bytes) + sum(net_conn_rx_bytes) > 0, sum(net_conn_tx_bytes) / (sum(net_conn_tx_bytes) + sum(net_conn_rx_bytes)), 0) AS io_rw,
    avg(net_duration_ms) AS avg_duration_ms
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
    AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND comm != 'process_metr'
  GROUP BY comm, net_local_addr, net_local_port, net_remote_addr, net_remote_port
)
ORDER BY rating DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  timestamp,
  pid,
  comm,
  net_local_addr,
  net_local_port,
  net_remote_addr,
  net_remote_port,
  net_conn_tx_bytes + net_conn_rx_bytes AS io_total,
  if(net_conn_tx_bytes + net_conn_rx_bytes > 0, net_conn_tx_bytes / (net_conn_tx_bytes + net_conn_rx_bytes), 0) AS io_rw,
  net_duration_ms AS duration_ms
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%')
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process,
  count() AS file_ops
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
GROUP BY time, process
HAVING file_ops > 1
ORDER BY time

panels.title: File Operations per Minute by Process

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), '] write') AS series,
  sum(file_write_bytes) / 60 AS bps
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND file_write_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), '] read') AS series,
  sum(file_read_bytes) / 60 AS bps
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND file_read_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  file_path,
  count() AS open_count,
  groupUniqArray(comm) AS processes,
  sum(file_read_bytes) + sum(file_write_bytes) AS io_total,
  if(sum(file_read_bytes) + sum(file_write_bytes) > 0, sum(file_write_bytes) / (sum(file_read_bytes) + sum(file_write_bytes)), 0) AS io_rw
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND file_path != ''
  AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (file_path ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
GROUP BY file_path
ORDER BY open_count DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  timestamp,
  pid,
  comm,
  file_path,
  file_read_bytes + file_write_bytes AS io_total,
  if(file_read_bytes + file_write_bytes > 0, file_write_bytes / (file_read_bytes + file_write_bytes), 0) AS io_rw,
  file_open_count
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND file_path != ''
  AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (file_path ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  timestamp AS timestamp,
  concat(
    'uid=', toString(loginuid),
    ' tty=pts/', toString(tty_nr - 34816),
    ' rc=', toString(exit_code),
    ' | ',
    exec,
    if(args != '', concat(' ', args), '')
  ) AS body,
  if(exit_code = 0, 'info', 'error') AS level,
  toString(loginuid) AS uid,
  concat('pts/', toString(tty_nr - 34816)) AS tty,
  comm,
  toString(exit_code) AS rc
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'exit'
  AND tty_nr >= 34816
  AND loginuid != 4294967295
  AND loginuid > 0
  AND exec NOT LIKE '%shellIntegration%'
  AND exec NOT LIKE '%-bash%'
  AND exec NOT LIKE '%/bash'
  AND exec NOT LIKE '%/zsh'
  AND comm NOT IN ('bash', 'zsh', 'sh', 'fish')
  AND comm NOT IN ('mesg', 'dircolors', 'tput', 'lesspipe', 'lessfile', 'basename', 'dirname')
  AND NOT (comm = 'id' AND args IN ('-u', '-un', '-g', '-gn'))
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  timestamp AS timestamp,
  concat(
    comm,
    '[', toString(pid), ']',
    ' → ',
    'SIG', CASE sig_num
      WHEN 1 THEN 'HUP'
      WHEN 2 THEN 'INT'
      WHEN 3 THEN 'QUIT'
      WHEN 6 THEN 'ABRT'
      WHEN 9 THEN 'KILL'
      WHEN 10 THEN 'USR1'
      WHEN 12 THEN 'USR2'
      WHEN 13 THEN 'PIPE'
      WHEN 14 THEN 'ALRM'
      WHEN 15 THEN 'TERM'
      WHEN 17 THEN 'CHLD'
      WHEN 19 THEN 'STOP'
      WHEN 20 THEN 'TSTP'
      ELSE toString(sig_num)
    END,
    ' → ',
    sig_target_comm,
    '[', toString(sig_target_pid), ']',
    if(sig_result != 0, concat(' FAILED(', toString(sig_result), ')'), '')
  ) AS body,
  if(sig_result = 0, if(sig_num = 9, 'error', 'info'), 'warning') AS level,
  comm AS sender,
  toString(pid) AS sender_pid,
  sig_target_comm AS target,
  toString(sig_target_pid) AS target_pid,
  toString(sig_num) AS signal,
  rule
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'signal'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  timestamp AS timestamp,
  concat(
    if(event_type = 'oom_kill', '🔴 OOM KILL', concat('⚠️ EXIT rc=', toString(exit_code))),
    ' | ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    ' | ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), ''),
    if(cgroup != '', concat(' | cgroup: ', cgroup), ''),
    if(event_type = 'oom_kill', concat(' | RSS max: ', formatReadableSize(rss_max_bytes)), '')
  ) AS body,
  if(event_type = 'oom_kill', 'critical', 'error') AS level,
  event_type,
  comm,
  toString(pid) AS pid,
  toString(exit_code) AS rc,
  rule,
  cgroup
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE (
    ('${error_filter}' = 'all' AND (event_type = 'oom_kill' OR (event_type = 'exit' AND exit_code != 0
      AND NOT (comm IN ('grep', 'kafka-run-class', 'ls', 'runc', 'runc:[2:INIT]', 'bash', 'iptables') AND exit_code IN (1, 2))
    AND NOT (comm = 'sshd' AND exit_code = 255))))
    OR ('${error_filter}' = 'oom_kill' AND event_type = 'oom_kill')
    OR ('${error_filter}' = 'exit' AND event_type = 'exit' AND exit_code != 0
      AND NOT (comm IN ('grep', 'kafka-run-class', 'ls', 'runc', 'runc:[2:INIT]', 'bash', 'iptables') AND exit_code IN (1, 2))
    AND NOT (comm = 'sshd' AND exit_code = 255))
  )
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  concat(comm, ' (', file_path, ')') AS disk,
  argMax(disk_used_bytes, timestamp) / argMax(disk_total_bytes, timestamp) AS used_pct
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'disk_usage'
  AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 2 MINUTE
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND disk_total_bytes > 0
GROUP BY comm, file_path
ORDER BY used_pct DESC

SELECT
  comm AS device,
  file_path AS mount_point,
  sec_remote_addr AS fs_type,
  formatReadableSize(argMax(disk_total_bytes, timestamp)) AS total,
  formatReadableSize(argMax(disk_used_bytes, timestamp)) AS used,
  formatReadableSize(argMax(disk_avail_bytes, timestamp)) AS available,
  round(argMax(disk_used_bytes, timestamp) * 100.0 / argMax(disk_total_bytes, timestamp), 1) AS used_pct
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'disk_usage'
  AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 2 MINUTE
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND disk_total_bytes > 0
GROUP BY comm, file_path, sec_remote_addr
ORDER BY used_pct DESC

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' (', file_path, ')') AS disk,
  avg(disk_used_bytes) / avg(disk_total_bytes) AS used_pct
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'disk_usage'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND disk_total_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, disk
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time,
  concat(comm, ' (', file_path, ')') AS disk,
  avg(disk_avail_bytes) AS available
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'disk_usage'
  AND timestamp >= toDateTime64($__from / 1000, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64($__to / 1000, 3)
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND disk_total_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, disk
ORDER BY time
